---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed solution

Describe the desired behavior or approach.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better?

## Acceptance criteria

* [ ] ...
* [ ] ...
* [ ] ...

## Architecture impact

* Does this add a new component to `main.py`? (requires architecture guard test)
* Does this change an existing public API? (requires CHANGELOG entry)
* Does this touch privacy-critical paths? (requires icontract pre/post-conditions)

## Additional context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
